description_long: This is a modern flat-screen television with a wide, rectangular display and slim profile, supported by two angled legs on either side. The front features a high-resolution screen displaying a vivid image of lotus flowers and green foliage, surrounded by a thin, black bezel. The back panel is matte black with subtle horizontal lines and a central mounting area, likely for wall brackets or stand attachment. The side views reveal the television's ultra-thin design, with a slight bulge at the center back for housing internal components and ports. The legs are splayed outward, providing stability and a contemporary aesthetic. No visible branding or control buttons are present on the exterior surfaces.
description: A sleek, modern flat-screen television with a thin black bezel, wide display, and two angled support legs. The back is matte black with a central mounting area and a slim profile.
description_view_0: Front view showing the vivid display screen with a thin black bezel and two angled legs.
description_view_1: Side profile highlighting the ultra-thin design and the outward splay of the support legs.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the matte black back panel with horizontal lines and a central mounting area.
description_view_3: Opposite side profile, again emphasizing the slimness and the leg structure.
attribute_bezel_design: thin black bezel, matte finish, minimalistic styling
